HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

 BSP tree for classification.

SIEForm * formulation
 Formulation used for SIE.

dcmplx omega

Static Protected Attributes

static bool NeedsAccurate = false
 Flag for accurate computation.
 

Detailed Description

Abstract base class for domains.

Provides methods to assemble the linear system of equations, compute fields, and query material properties. Derived classes must implement Green's function initialization, material permittivity/permeability, and scattering metrics.

Definition at line 38 of file Domain.h.

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

◆ Domain()

Domain::Domain ( SurfaceMesh * mesh,
int dIndex,
dcmplx inVacuumWavelength )

Construct a domain over a mesh region at a given vacuum wavelength.

Parameters
meshSurface mesh containing all boundary triangles.
dIndexInteger region index (as labeled in mesh).
inVacuumWavelengthVacuum wavelength \(\lambda_0\) (complex to allow dispersion).

◆ absorptionCS()

virtual double Domain::absorptionCS ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 1 > * solVector)
pure virtual

Absorption cross section.

Parameters
solVectorSolution coefficients \(\mathbf{x}\).
Returns
Absorption cross section.
Note
Not always accurate (volumetric methods based on Ohmic losses have better accuracy).

Implemented in DomainHom3D, and DomainLayered3D.

cvec polarization )
pure virtual

Add a Dipole excitation (ownership transferred to Domain).

locationDipole position.
polarizationComplex dipole moment vector.
Returns
0 on success; non-zero otherwise.

◆ AddGaussian()

virtual int Domain::AddGaussian ( double wavelength,
double waist,
rvec focal_point,
rvec propagationdirection,
cvec polarization )
pure virtual

Add a Gaussian beam excitation.

Parameters
wavelengthVacuum wavelength.
waistBeam waist radius \( w_0 \).
focal_pointBeam focus position.
propagationdirectionUnit vector of beam propagation.
polarizationComplex polarization vector.
Returns
0 on success; non-zero otherwise.
Note
Not implemented for layered media.

Implemented in DomainHom3D, and DomainLayered3D.

◆ AddPlaneWave()

virtual int Domain::AddPlaneWave ( dcmplx wavelength,
rvec propagationDirection,
cvec polarization )
pure virtual

Add a PlaneWave excitation (ownership transferred to Domain).

Parameters
wavelengthVacuum wavelength \(\lambda_0\) (complex allowed).
propagationDirectionUnit vector \(\hat{\mathbf k}\) (direction of travel).
polarizationComplex polarization vector (transverse to \(\hat{\mathbf k}\)).
Returns
0 on success; non-zero otherwise.

Implemented in DomainHom3D, and DomainLayered3D.
